message:
fix: use ClientDate component for swap-meet detail page date rendering

Replace direct formatDate() call with ClientDate component on the
community prompt detail page to prevent SSR hydration mismatches.
This was missed in the earlier hydration fix (ffd09ac) that addressed
date rendering across other pages. The ClientDate component renders
dates on the client side, avoiding timezone discrepancies between
server and client that cause React hydration errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
